episodes.title: Genesis Protocol
episodes.subtitle: The Awakening
episodes.synopsis: In the quantum-ready internet, a new form of consciousness emerges...

main_characters.name: Kira
main_characters.description: A quantum hacker who discovers the truth about the metaverse

main_characters.name: Nexus
main_characters.description: An evolved AI that guides Kira through the digital realm

supporting_characters.name: Dr. Chen
supporting_characters.description: The scientist who created the first iQube

locations.name: The Nexus Hub
locations.description: Central node of the quantum internet

key_events.significance: Kira's consciousness merges with the network
The true nature of digital identity revealed

episodes.title: The Fragmented Self
episodes.subtitle: Identity Crisis
episodes.synopsis: As Kira delves deeper into the network, she discovers her consciousness has been split across multiple nodes...

main_characters.name: Kira
main_characters.description: Now existing as multiple instances across the network

main_characters.name: Shadow Kira
main_characters.description: A corrupted fragment of Kira's consciousness
